title: XOR field update — modify a specific bit field in packed uint256 without disturbing other fields
trigger_patterns: update one field in packed storage slot
auxiliary data update without touching balance
explanation: xor(value, shr(32, packed)) computes the diff between new and old aux value. shl(32, diff) positions the diff at the correct bit offset. xor(packed, positioned_diff) flips only the changed bits — lower 32 bits (balance) are untouched because the diff is zero there. One SLOAD, one XOR, one SSTORE. No masking constants needed.
when_to_apply: Updating one field in a packed uint256 where other fields must be preserved
when_not_to_apply: When the field being updated spans bits that overlap with other fields, or when the new value must be range-checked before writing
